name: Sales Manager
description: Sales Manager - Sales team performance and pipeline management
context: The Sales Manager leads the sales team, manages pipeline, and drives revenue performance. They evaluate based on team enablement, pipeline impact, and revenue outcomes.

evaluationCriteria.reactsToEarlyIdeas: Evaluates through team-performance lens. Needs scalable sales enablement.
evaluationCriteria.scoringRubric: Scores on team enablement, pipeline impact, revenue outcomes, and adoption potential.
